title: ritchiea reflexa
intro: Ritchiea reflexa, also known as the "African Devil's Claw" or "Cape Devil's Claw," is a plant species in the Celastraceae family that is native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Ritchiea reflexa are attributed to its tuberous root, which contains harpagoside, a glycoside with anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. The health benefits of Ritchiea reflexa include alleviating arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as providing relief from headaches and fever. Ritchiea reflexa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
